title: Rhaegar Targaryen: The Prince Who Changed Everything #got #shorts
description: Rhaegar Targaryen was not the villain history remembers. A prince driven by prophecy, he made a choice that reshaped Westeros forever. This is the truth behind the man who started the rebellion. #Rhaegar #Targaryen #GameOfThrones #Shorts

scenes.narration: Rhaegar Targaryen is remembered as the man who started a war—but the truth is far more complicated.
scenes.image_prompt: Rhaegar standing in shadow with a crown of light behind him, mysterious and noble, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: He was not a reckless prince, but a quiet, thoughtful man shaped by books, music, and prophecy.
scenes.image_prompt: Rhaegar playing a harp in a dim hall, reflective and calm, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: From a young age, he believed he had a role to play in a future yet to come.
scenes.image_prompt: young Rhaegar reading ancient scrolls with glowing symbols, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: He became obsessed with prophecy—the belief that a savior would be born from his bloodline.
scenes.image_prompt: fire visions reflecting in Rhaegar’s eyes, prophecy imagery, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: To him, the future mattered more than the present, even if it meant breaking the world around him.
scenes.image_prompt: Rhaegar walking away from a crown toward a burning horizon, symbolic choice, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: When he chose Lyanna Stark, it was not just desire—but a decision tied to something greater.
scenes.image_prompt: Rhaegar and Lyanna meeting in secret, soft but tense atmosphere, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The realm saw it as kidnapping—but Rhaegar may have believed he was fulfilling destiny.
scenes.image_prompt: whispers spreading through courts, rumors turning into outrage, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: His actions ignited Robert’s Rebellion, turning prophecy into war and hope into destruction.
scenes.image_prompt: war banners rising as flames spread across Westeros map, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: At the Trident, he faced Robert Baratheon, a battle that would decide everything.
scenes.image_prompt: Rhaegar and Robert charging toward each other in battle, epic clash, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Rhaegar died as a prince—but the consequences of his choices lived on in a secret the world was never meant to know.
scenes.image_prompt: Rhaegar falling in battle as his crown sinks into the river, symbolic ending, vertical 1080x1920
